meta.title: MWC Virginia Online — Telehealth as the 4th Location
meta.subtitle: Single-sub-account build inside the existing MWC HIPAA account using the [ONLINE] namespace. 30-day test, then kill / continue lean / invest.
meta.brand_voice: "Men's Wellness Centers" or "MWC" · members not patients · telehealth appointment not consultation · no "free" · no "guy/guys" · no em-dashes · no unsubstantiated medical claims
meta.test_window: 30-day parallel test alongside the in-person rebuild

overview.concept: Treat Virginia Online (telehealth) as the 4th MWC location next to the three physical clinics, built in the same HIPAA sub-account the in-person rebuild team uses. A strict [ONLINE] namespace plus a written carve-out contract prevent collisions. One channel-agnostic member funnel so a member can move between online and in-clinic without a duplicate record.
principles: One sub-account, two workstreams — isolate via [ONLINE] namespace, never by duplicating the account.
Channel-agnostic member journey — book online, convert to clinic, all on one record.
Geo-routed lead capture — ZIP drive-time decides which of the 4 locations is offered.
Virginia-only, 18+ hard gates at lead capture and again at visit join.
Clinical content lives in Practice Fusion, never in GHL Conversations.
Cash-pay, No Surprises Act good-faith estimate on file before the first visit.
Everything reversible — the 30-day test produces data, not lock-in.

domains.purpose: City clinic pages (one per physical location)

domains.where: New subdomain, CNAME to Vercel, SSL auto-issued

carveout_owned: All tags prefixed mwc-online- or mwc-channel-online
All Contact custom fields prefixed online_
All Appointment custom fields prefixed online_
The Virginia Online calendar group and its calendars
Custom values keyed online_* or provider_doxy_room_*
The visit.menswellnesscenters.com subdomain in GHL settings
carveout_shared: Contact records and generic fields (name, email, phone, address, DOB, gender, lead_source, UTMs)
Appointment generics (start_time, end_time, assigned_user_id, calendar_id, appointment_status)

roles.setting: Edit Virginia Online calendar group only

out_of_scope: Veradigm Unity API integration (provider documents manually in Practice Fusion during the test)
Two-way GHL ↔ Practice Fusion sync (online_pf_patient_guid entered manually)
Custom Vercel provider portal (provider works in GHL + Doxy + Practice Fusion)
Multi-provider scaling (one provider serves all four locations)
MyDose / Healthie / other platform migrations (parked until day-30 decision)

day30_decisions.name: Kill
day30_decisions.detail: Park telehealth, focus on the in-person rebuild.

day30_decisions.name: Continue lean
day30_decisions.detail: Keep this exact stack, scale carefully with a second provider and more states.

day30_decisions.name: Invest
day30_decisions.detail: Build the full EMR sync architecture (Supabase + Unity, or Healthie / MyDose white-label) for multi-provider, multi-state scale.

day30_metrics: Channel mix by geo tier (urban / suburban / rural × city1 / city2 / city3 / online)
CPL, CPBC, show rate, completion rate, eRx-issued rate, payment-captured rate per channel
Member-conversion rate at 30 days, 90-day projection from week-4 data
LTV proxy per channel from first-month spend
Channel-switch rate (members who tried one then the other)
Ops cost per visit per channel
Member NPS / qualitative feedback per channel

ghl_features.use: 4 calendar groups (3 clinics + Virginia Online), each with Initial/Follow-Up/Lab Review. Eligibility gate online to VA residents.
Channel-agnostic [MWC] Member Journey + per-appointment [MWC ONLINE] Visit Pipeline for today's roster.
All [ONLINE] automation: qualification, provisioning, reminders, intake chase, completion, no-show, follow-up, membership, labs, channel-switch.
Form-submit, appointment-booked, appointment-status, custom-field-changed (outcome), payment-captured drive the workflows.
Unified geo-routed lead capture, initial intake, financial responsibility — embedded on the Virginia landing pages.
"Help me pick" decision-tree wizard as a quiz; symptom inventory (ADAM) inside intake; post-visit NPS as a survey.
Booking, switch-channel, intake, reschedule, lab, tech-check, directions — each tags the contact on click for attribution.
30+ online_* Contact fields and online_* Appointment fields, namespaced for the carve-out.
provider_doxy_room_{id}, clinic_address_{city}, lab partner URL, fee schedule — referenced by workflows and templates.
Channel, geo-tier, lifecycle, behavioral, and source tag families. Workflow guards key off lifecycle tags.
A2P-registered SMS + authenticated email. Scheduling/billing/logistics only — never clinical content.
Not used in the 30-day test; revisit if a channel proves high-intent.
Pattern A: existing main line with IVR (1-3 clinics, 4 Virginia Online, 5 billing). Pattern B dedicated number only if volume justifies.
Out of scope for the test (clinical-adjacent). Candidate for after-hours FAQ + booking at scale.
Candidate for the member portal: onboarding course, protocol education, lab-prep modules. See Portal & App.
Possible members-only community at scale; not in the 30-day test.
Primary native option for the member portal — appointments, docs, invoices, course content under one login. See Portal & App.
Members get the portal as a branded app; providers/ops get the app for roster + conversations. See Portal & App.
Cash-pay membership as a recurring subscription product; visit fees as one-time products. Drives membership-active + LTV.
Good-faith estimate (No Surprises Act) as an estimate; receipts for HSA/FSA as invoices.
No discounts in brand voice; tax handling per accountant if needed.
Telemedicine consent, HIPAA, financial responsibility as e-signable documents tied to the contact.
Post-visit review request workflow to Google Business Profile, gated on a positive NPS response.
Channel × geo-tier × UTM × provider dashboard — the day-30 decision dataset.
Landing pages live on Vercel, not GHL funnels. GHL blog/funnels not used; keep attribution via UTMs.
Monthly member newsletter audience; nurture and win-back broadcasts segmented by channel and geo.
Org marketing tool, not part of the member lifecycle build.
Member-referral handled via referrer field + tag for the test; affiliate manager only if a formal program launches.
Labs/prescriptions could become custom objects at scale; during the test they stay as appointment fields + Practice Fusion.
Saved views: today's online roster, intake-incomplete, no-show recovery, labs-due, churn-risk.
In-clinic QR to the Virginia Online landing page for cross-channel referral; optional.
Not applicable to the member lifecycle.

portal_app.intro: The doc stops at GHL automation; the member portal and app are the biggest un-spec'd surface. GHL now ships a native Client Portal, Memberships/Courses, Communities, and a white-label mobile app, so MWC can give members a real "home base" without a custom build for the 30-day test. A custom Vercel + Supabase portal (or a Healthie / MyDose white-label) is the scale path once EMR sync is on the table.

options.name: GHL Client Portal (native)
options.what: One member login surfacing appointments, e-signed documents, invoices/subscriptions, and any Memberships course content. Lives at a branded subdomain.
pros: Single sign-on across portal + courses + community
cons: No native lab-results view (link out to lab partner)
No EMR data (clinical stays in Practice Fusion)

options.name: GHL Memberships / Courses
options.what: Structured content: onboarding journey, protocol education, lab-prep, what-to-expect modules. Gated to active members.

options.name: GHL Branded Mobile App (white-label)
options.what: The LeadConnector app white-labeled as the MWC app — members get the portal as an app; ops/providers get conversations + roster on mobile.
pros: No app-store build effort beyond white-label setup
cons: Shared LeadConnector feature set, not bespoke
options.fit: Optional during test, strong for continue-lean

options.name: Custom Vercel + Supabase portal/app
options.what: Bespoke member dashboard and PWA/native app: visit history, lab trends, billing, secure messaging, prescription status, education.

options.name: Healthie / MyDose white-label
options.what: Purpose-built telehealth platform with member app, scheduling, charting, and billing.
cons: Migration off GHL for clinical flows

portal_app.recommendation: For the 30-day test: GHL Client Portal + Memberships, optionally the white-label mobile app. It is inside the HIPAA sub-account, needs no custom code, and reuses the same contact records and subscriptions the workflows already drive. Defer the custom Vercel + Supabase portal (or Healthie / MyDose) to the invest path, gated on day-30 demand and the EMR-sync decision.

member_features.notes: Reads the same GHL calendar/appointment data; reschedule link inline.
Telemedicine consent, HIPAA, financial responsibility stored on the contact.
Card on file, subscription status, receipts for HSA/FSA.
First-90-days journey, protocol and lab-prep modules.
Link to lab partner; mwc-online-labs-* tags. Results stay in Practice Fusion / lab portal during the test.
"Your prescription was sent" comms; full Rx detail in pharmacy/EMR, not GHL.
Scheduling/billing/logistics only — clinical questions routed to a visit.

native_setup: Enable Client Portal in the sub-account; brand it (logo, colors, visit.menswellnesscenters.com domain).
Turn on Memberships; build the "MWC Member — First 90 Days" course with drip modules.
Connect Payments; create the membership subscription product + visit-fee products.
Load Documents & Contracts templates for the three consents (attorney-reviewed for VA).
Map portal tabs: Appointments, Documents, Billing, Learn.
(Optional) Order the white-label mobile app and submit branding assets.
Add a portal-invite step to [ONLINE] 08 Member Onboarding.

contact.name: online_channel_actual
contact.notes: Set by booking workflow from the calendar booked

contact.name: online_geo_tier
contact.notes: urban / suburban / rural, computed from ZIP

contact.name: online_state_of_residence
contact.notes: Hard-gate to VA during the test

contact.name: online_age_verified
contact.notes: Set after DOB confirmation at intake

contact.name: online_pf_patient_guid
contact.notes: Manual link to Practice Fusion until sync exists

contact.name: online_member_status
contact.notes: lead / qualified / booked / member_active / member_paused / member_lost / disqualified

appointment.name: online_appt_outcome
appointment.notes: completed_documented / completed_pending_docs / noshow / cancelled_by_member / cancelled_by_provider / tech_issue

appointment.name: online_appt_channel_switched_from
appointment.notes: If member changed channels at booking

common.value: Up to 24 hours before; after that, staff action
Lead capture form complete before booking
Intake sent after booking, required to attend

online_specifics: Location: "Virtual (Doxy.me)" with the provider's permanent room URL in custom value provider_doxy_room_{provider_id}
Buffer: 10 min after (vs 15 min for clinics)
Broader hours possible (no commute): Mon-Thu 9am-7pm ET, Fri 9am-3pm ET, optional Sat 10am-2pm ET
Booking instructions: "You'll get a secure video link 24 hours before. Have a government-issued ID ready for camera verification"
Eligibility gate: ONLY members with online_state_of_residence = VA

forms.name: [MWC] Virginia Lead Capture
forms.purpose: One geo-routed form on every Virginia landing page; branches destination by channel preference.
items: Channel preference (options shown by ZIP geo)

forms.name: Geo logic on channel preference
forms.purpose: Drive-time lookup from ZIP to the 3 clinics decides which options to show.
items: Urban (<20 min): all 4 options, nearest clinic preselected
Rural (>45 min): Online preselected, all 4 visible
Each option carries a short explainer (address + drive time, or the telehealth pitch)

forms.name: "Help me pick" decision-tree wizard
forms.purpose: Three questions that recommend a channel, member can override.
items: Q1 Prefer face-to-face for an initial visit? Yes / No / No pref
Q2 Weekday evenings or Saturday mornings best? Yes / Other times
Q3 Comfortable with a brief video visit from home/office? Yes / Rather come in
Yes→nearest clinic; No/No-pref + video-comfortable → Virginia Online; rather-come-in → nearest clinic

forms.name: [MWC] Initial Intake
forms.purpose: Sent after any Initial Visit booking; same clinical content both channels; required before the appointment.
items: Medical history (cardiovascular, prostate, breast cancer family hx)

forms.name: [ONLINE] Telemedicine Consent
forms.purpose: Virginia Online channel only; drafted to Virginia telemedicine law; attorney-reviewed before launch.
items: Right to refuse/discontinue without affecting in-person care
Member physically in Virginia at visit time

forms.name: [MWC] Financial Responsibility
forms.purpose: Both channels. Cash-pay disclosure + No Surprises Act good-faith estimate.

forms.name: [CLINIC] Standard Visit Consent
forms.purpose: Existing MWC clinic consent — re-link from the new landing pages, do not duplicate.

pipelines.name: [MWC] Member Journey
pipelines.scope: Channel-agnostic — one funnel so a member who books online then converts to clinic threads a single record.

stages.entry: Appointment created on any MWC calendar
stages.exit: Intake complete or appt time passes

pipelines.name: [MWC ONLINE] Visit Pipeline
pipelines.scope: Per-appointment ops roster for today; channel-aware via tag + field.

stages.entry: Member acknowledged a reminder OR completed intake
Doxy waiting-room event (online) or front-desk check-in (in-person)

workflows.name: Lead Qualification
workflows.trigger: Lead capture submitted on any MWC Virginia landing page
steps: Wait 2s for contact to settle
Tag mwc-online-lead
Set fields from form (UTMs, source, state, age, channel preference)
Geo lookup: drive time to each clinic → set distance / nearest clinic / geo tier
Apply geo-tier tag
Gate: state = VA? No → tag disqualified-state → 07a → end
Gate: age >= 18? No → tag disqualified-age → 07b → end
Tag mwc-online-qualified, set member_status = qualified
Apply channel tag from channel preference
Advance Member Journey → Qualified
Branch on channel preference → send Booking Welcome (online / city / undecided variant)
Wait 1h, if not booked → 00.1 Booking Nudge

workflows.name: Booking Nudge
workflows.trigger: Called by 00 when lead idle 1h after qualification
steps: SMS Booking Nudge 1 (channel variant)
Wait 23h; booked? stop
Email Booking Nudge 2
Wait 48h; booked? stop
SMS Booking Nudge 3 (may offer to switch channels)
Wait 5 days; booked? stop
Tag mwc-online-lead-stale; end

workflows.name: Appointment Provisioning
workflows.trigger: Appointment booked on any MWC calendar (3 clinics + Virginia Online)
steps: Guard: qualified OR member-active? else stop (lets in-person rebuild handle non-online bookings)
Identify calendar → set online_appt_channel
Branch: online → look up provider Doxy URL → set appt + contact doxy fields; in_person → look up clinic address → set appt address field
Set provider name
Tag mwc-online-booked
Advance Member Journey → Booked; member_status = booked
Add to [MWC ONLINE] Visit Pipeline → Scheduled
Branch → Booking Confirmation (online vs in-person variant)
If intake required → 03 Intake Form Nudge
Trigger 02 Pre-Visit Reminders

workflows.name: Pre-Visit Reminders
steps: T-72h Prep (online: tech check + intake; in-person: directions, parking, ID, what-to-bring)
T-24h Reminder SMS + email
T-1h Reminder SMS
Online only: T-15min Join Now SMS w/ Doxy link
In-person only: T-30min Leave Now SMS w/ directions
T-0 online: Provider Ready SMS

workflows.name: Intake Form Nudge
workflows.trigger: Called by 01 when intake required (Initial Visits)
steps: Wait 5 min after booking → Intake Request email
Wait 24h; complete? stop → Reminder 1 SMS
T-48h; complete? stop → Reminder 2 email (concierge offer)
T-24h; complete? stop → Final Reminder SMS ("visit may be rescheduled")
T-2h; complete? stop → ops task: proceed or reschedule

workflows.name: Visit Completion
steps: Tag mwc-online-completed
Increment visits_count_total
Branch: increment online vs in-person count
Set last_visit_date / channel
Advance Member Journey → Visit Completed
Post-Visit Thank You email + SMS
If eRx issued → "Your Prescription Was Sent" email
If labs ordered → "Your Lab Order Is Ready" email
If follow-up recommended → 06 Follow-Up Nudge
Wait 3 days; if no follow-up booked → Schedule Your Follow-Up email

workflows.name: No-Show Recovery
workflows.trigger: Appt start + 15 min AND outcome null or noshow
steps: Tag mwc-online-noshow; set outcome = noshow if null
Advance pipeline
Wait 1h → Recovery 1 SMS (may offer to switch channels) + email
Wait 24h; rebooked? stop → Recovery 2 SMS (priority-slot framing, not price)
Wait 3 days; rebooked? stop → Recovery 3 email (FAQ)
Wait 7 days; rebooked? stop → tag lead-stale; end

workflows.name: Follow-Up Scheduling Nudge
workflows.trigger: Called by 04 OR when next_followup_due_date set
steps: Wait until 14 days before due date
"Time to Schedule" email w/ calendar link (preferred channel, offer to switch)
Wait 3 days; booked? stop → Follow-Up Reminder SMS
Continue until booked or due date + 7 days

workflows.name: Disqualification — Out of State
steps: "Out of State" email: explain VA-only at launch, capture future-state interest
Tag mwc-online-future-state-{state}
End

workflows.name: Disqualification — Age
steps: "Under 18" email with general men's health resources
No further outreach; end

workflows.name: Member Onboarding
workflows.trigger: Membership payment captured (first time, any channel)
steps: Tag mwc-online-member-active; set member_status + member_since
Welcome to Membership email (first-90-days, can switch channels anytime)
Welcome SMS
Invite to the member portal (Client Portal + onboarding course)
Schedule first lab reminder for 6 weeks out
Add to monthly newsletter audience

workflows.name: Lab Reminder
steps: Lab Reminder email w/ lab partner + scheduling link
Wait 7 days; labs-completed tag? stop → Lab Reminder SMS
Wait until due date; completed? stop → ops task: call member

workflows.name: Channel Switch Detected
workflows.trigger: Member books on a channel different from last_visit_channel
steps: Tag mwc-channel-switched
Increment channel_switched_count
Ops task: note the switch (retention insight)
Continue normal provisioning (no member-facing change)

workflows.name: Membership Billing & Dunning
steps: On failure: tag payment-failed-1, set appt_payment_status = failed
Retry per Payments schedule; email + SMS "update your card" w/ portal billing link
Escalate failed-2 → failed-3 over the dunning window
On card-expiring: proactive update reminder
If unrecovered: tag member-paused, ops task, pause protocol comms
On recovery: clear failed tags, restore member-active

workflows.name: Reputation / Review Request
steps: Send post-visit NPS survey (1 question)
Branch: promoter (9-10) → review request to Google Business Profile via reputation tool
Passive/detractor (<=8) → internal ops alert, no public ask, service-recovery outreach
Tag review-requested; suppress re-asking for 90 days

workflows.name: Member Referral
workflows.trigger: Member clicks refer link OR ops sets referrer
steps: Capture online_referrer_member_id on the new lead
Tag mwc-src-referral on the referred contact
Thank-you to the referring member (brand-voice, no incentive language unless a program exists)
Route the referred lead into 00 Lead Qualification
Ops insight: referral source for LTV analysis

workflows.name: Win-Back / Reactivation
steps: Segment by last channel + geo tier
Email 1: "Here when you're ready" + what's new
Wait 5 days; engaged? exit → SMS check-in (offer the easier channel)
Wait 7 days; engaged? exit → final email w/ value reframe
If re-engaged → 00/01; else tag dormant, drop cadence

workflows.name: Education / Onboarding Drip
steps: Day 0: portal + onboarding course invite
Week 1: what to expect on protocol
Week 3: lab-prep + scheduling primer
Week 6: progress check-in + symptom re-score survey
Day 80: 90-day review + follow-up booking nudge
All content links to Memberships/Courses modules

workflows.name: Annual / Protocol Cadence
steps: Annual: comprehensive review + labs reminder
Quarterly: follow-up due check vs next_followup_due_date
Birthday: brand-voice greeting (no medical claim)
Membership anniversary: tenure acknowledgment + retention touch

sms.name: Lead Welcome (Online)
sms.body:
MWC: Welcome {{first_name}}. Your Virginia Online appointment is one tap away. Pick a time: {{calendar_link}}
Reply STOP to opt out.

sms.name: Lead Welcome (In-person)
sms.body:
MWC: Welcome {{first_name}}. Your visit at our {{clinic_name}} clinic is one tap away. Pick a time: {{calendar_link}}
Reply STOP to opt out.

sms.name: Lead Welcome (Undecided)
sms.body:
MWC: Welcome {{first_name}}. We offer four ways to be seen in Virginia: three clinics and online. Pick what works: {{wizard_link}}
Reply STOP to opt out.

sms.name: Booking Confirmation (Online)
sms.body:
MWC: Booked with {{provider_name}} on {{appt_date}} at {{appt_time}} ET. Join here at start time: {{doxy_url}}
Save this link.

sms.name: Booking Confirmation (In-person)
sms.body: MWC: Booked with {{provider_name}} on {{appt_date}} at {{appt_time}} ET at {{clinic_address}}. Arrive 15 minutes early. Directions: {{directions_link}}

sms.name: T-24h Reminder (Online)
sms.body: MWC: Your Virginia Online appointment is tomorrow at {{appt_time}} ET with {{provider_name}}. Join link: {{doxy_url}}

sms.name: T-24h Reminder (In-person)
sms.body: MWC: Your appointment is tomorrow at {{appt_time}} ET at {{clinic_address}}. Plan for traffic, arrive 15 min early. Directions: {{directions_link}}

sms.name: T-1h Reminder (Online)
sms.body: MWC: Your appointment starts in 1 hour at {{appt_time}} ET. Have your ID ready for the camera. Join: {{doxy_url}}

sms.name: T-30min Leave Now (In-person)
sms.body: MWC: Your appointment at {{clinic_name}} starts in 30 min. Time to head out: {{directions_link}}

sms.name: T-15min Join Now (Online)
sms.body: MWC: We're ready when you are. Tap to join: {{doxy_url}}

sms.name: Post-Visit Thank You (both)
sms.body: MWC: Thanks for meeting with {{provider_name}} today. Your next steps and any prescriptions are coming to your email. Reply if you have questions.

sms.name: No-Show Recovery 1 (Online)
sms.body: MWC: We missed you at {{appt_time}}. Things come up. Rebook here: {{rebook_link}}. We also offer in-person at any of our 3 Virginia clinics if that's easier.

sms.name: No-Show Recovery 1 (In-person)
sms.body: MWC: We missed you at {{appt_time}}. Things come up. Rebook here: {{rebook_link}}. We also offer Virginia Online if a drive is hard to make work.

sms.name: Intake Form Reminder 1 (both)
sms.body: MWC: Heads up, your intake form takes about 10 minutes and is needed before your visit on {{appt_date}}: {{intake_link}}

sms.name: Lab Reminder (both)
sms.body: MWC: Time for your labs. Best draw is in the morning, no food after midnight. Schedule at our lab partner: {{lab_link}}

sms.name: Payment Update (dunning)
sms.body: MWC: We couldn't process your membership payment. Update your card to keep your protocol active: {{billing_link}}

email.name: Lead Welcome (Online)
email.subject: Your Virginia Online appointment, one step closer

email.name: Lead Welcome (In-person)
email.subject: Your visit at MWC {{clinic_name}}, one step closer

email.name: Lead Welcome (Undecided)
email.subject: Four ways to be seen at MWC

email.name: T-72h Prep (Online)
email.subject: How to prepare for your Virginia Online visit

email.name: T-72h Prep (In-person)
email.subject: How to prepare for your MWC visit

email.name: Post-Visit
email.subject: Your next steps from today's visit

email.name: Out of State
email.subject: We'll let you know when MWC reaches your state

email_anatomy: Header: MWC wordmark, Midnight Navy bar, "Virginia" tag
Single primary CTA button (Accent Orange #E8670A, white text, Oswald)
Signature: provider name or "The Men's Wellness Centers Care Team"
internal: Provider: Member has not completed intake at T-2h
Provider: Visit ready to document (T+30min after start)

conversations.auto_assign: Care coordinator owns conversations until paid; then provider owns clinical, coordinator owns admin
conversations.after_hours: "Thanks for messaging MWC. Our care team is offline. We respond within 1 business day. For medical emergencies, call 911."
conversations.clinical_rule: GHL Conversations never contain clinical detail from staff side. Clinical content lives in Practice Fusion. Conversations = scheduling, billing, general questions, brief logistics only.

phone.pattern_a: Existing main MWC number with IVR: 1 City1, 2 City2, 3 City3, 4 Virginia Online, 5 billing. Simpler, fewer numbers. Recommended for the test.
phone.pattern_b: Dedicated Virginia Online number on the statewide page, forwards to ops. Cleaner attribution, more A2P overhead. Use post-test if volume justifies.

rows.task: Send rebuild-team carve-out contract; get written acknowledgement
Create [ONLINE] Editor role and assign
Provision visit.menswellnesscenters.com (DNS + Vercel)
Bulk-create all online_* Contact + Appointment custom fields
Create all tags
Confirm 30-day block schedule (clinic vs online days)
Create 4 calendar groups + calendars; set availability per blocks
Configure lead capture form with geo logic
Build 3 city pages + statewide telehealth page on Vercel
Build the 2 pipelines
Build comms templates (SMS + email, channel variants)
Set up trigger links + UTM conventions
Build workflows 00, 00.1, 01, 02, 03
End-to-end smoke test (fake VA contact, online channel)
Build workflows 04, 05, 06, 07, 08, 09, 10 (+ added 11-16 as scope allows)
Smoke test in-person channel for each city
Walk the full flow with a real test booking, both channels
Final ad creative per geo tier
Pilot one real VA member (online); document friction
Pilot one real VA member (in-person, any city); document friction
Adjust based on pilot feedback
Launch ad campaigns in market

build_plan.estimate: 24 to 32 focused hours over two weeks.
checklist: Rebuild-team carve-out contract acknowledged in writing
[ONLINE] Editor role created and assigned
visit.menswellnesscenters.com DNS resolves, SSL valid
All 30+ online_* Contact custom fields exist
All Appointment custom fields exist
All tags exist
4 calendar groups with correct availability per block schedule
Lead capture geo logic returns correct options for urban/suburban/rural ZIPs
Intake form complete and tested end-to-end
Telemedicine consent attorney-reviewed for Virginia
Financial responsibility form includes Good Faith Estimate
Both pipelines exist with stages defined
All workflows built with guard step as first action
All comms templates exist in both channel variants where applicable
Trigger links + UTM conventions configured
Phone routing pattern (A or B) decided and configured
Provider Doxy room URL stored as custom value
Doxy.me Clinic BAA executed
Provider VA license + DEA + VA controlled-substance license verified
EPCS activation underway/active in Practice Fusion
Provider walked through both online and in-person workflows
Member portal: Client Portal branded + onboarding course built (if portal in scope)
At least one fake-contact end-to-end test per channel passed
At least one real-pilot test per channel passed
Reporting dashboard wired (channel, geo tier, UTM, provider)
